stage: Stage42-BV Source Acquisition Status / Blocker Matrix
current_facts: 当前不是 true 3D world model。
当前不是 large-scale foundation world model。
当前仍是 protected dataset-local / raw-frame 2.5D 多智能体 world-state candidate。
Stage42-BV 是 source acquisition / blocker matrix，不训练模型，不下载数据。
OpenTraj toolkit MIT 许可证不能自动覆盖 ETH/UCY/TrajNet 等第三方数据许可。
TrajNet++ challenge scene snippets 不能自动等同于 raw long-track t50/t100 support。
future endpoints / waypoints 只允许作为 supervised labels 或 evaluation labels，不作为 inference input。
不使用 central velocity，不使用 test endpoints 构建 goals，不使用 test metrics 调 threshold。
t+50 / t+100 仍是 raw-frame horizon，不能写成 seconds-level。

official_references.name: TrajNet++ EPFL official page
official_references.use_for_m3w: official challenge/source reference only; does not by itself provide long raw t50/t100 support
official_references.notes: EPFL describes TrajNet++ as an open benchmark/challenge with data and evaluation code on AIcrowd, and scripts under MIT license.

official_references.name: TrajNet++ AIcrowd challenge
official_references.use_for_m3w: official scene-format reference and access/action page; local challenge snippets remain too short for raw-frame t100 repair
official_references.notes: AIcrowd describes 21-frame scenes with first 9 observed and last 12 predicted; useful benchmark, but not a long raw-track source in the current local inventory.

official_references.name: OpenTraj GitHub
official_references.use_for_m3w: toolkit and local dataset index reference; underlying dataset terms must be audited separately
official_references.notes: OpenTraj is useful for loaders and metadata, but its toolkit license is not accepted as blanket permission for every third-party dataset.

official_references.name: ETH CVL datasets page
official_references.use_for_m3w: official ETH data/terms reference; research-purpose boundary must be preserved
official_references.notes: ETH CVL page says maintained data are for research purposes unless stated differently and asks users to cite authors.

official_references.name: UCY crowd data page
official_references.use_for_m3w: official UCY crowd-data action target; user/manual verification required if direct access fails
official_references.notes: The URL is widely referenced as the UCY data source, but the current web fetch failed, so no automatic download or terms claim is made.

blocker_matrix.root_cause: ETH-Person XML has technical same-family h50 signal, but terms remain unverified and the validation-only dry-run does not safely repair the actual ETH_seq_eth holdout.
blocker_matrix.next_action: Verify ETH-Person terms or provide an official/legal source-compatible ETH_seq long-track source; then rerun conversion, no-leakage, source-CV, and t50 policy training.

blocker_matrix.root_cause: students001 and students003 are t50-capable independent sources, but students002 is too short and duplicate formats cannot be counted as independent support.
blocker_matrix.next_action: Provide one more legal independent t50-capable UCY_students-family long-track source before train/val/holdout source-CV can be attempted.

blocker_matrix.root_cause: Local TrajNet files parse as fixed short challenge snippets rather than raw long tracks, so they cannot repair raw-frame t100 source-CV.
blocker_matrix.next_action: Use TrajNet++ challenge data only for scene-format diagnostics, or provide legal raw long-track TrajNet-compatible sources if t100 source-CV is required.

blocker_matrix.root_cause: ETH-Person XML t100 dry-run is technically positive but still terms-unverified; official/deployable global t100 cannot advance without permission and rerun.
blocker_matrix.next_action: Confirm official ETH-Person terms or provide permitted ETH_UCY long raw sources, then rerun official conversion and strict source-CV.

blocker_matrix.root_cause: Only source-specific calibration evidence exists; SDD remains pixel raw-frame and external data remain dataset-local or source-specific calibrated subsets.
blocker_matrix.next_action: Report metric/time only inside explicitly source-specific calibrated subsets after conversion/eval; keep global M3W raw-frame/dataset-local.

user_action_required.action: Verify ETH-Person terms or provide an official/legal source-compatible ETH_seq long-track source; then rerun conversion, no-leakage, source-CV, and t50 policy training.
user_action_required.allowed_next_command: rerun relevant Stage42 conversion/source-CV only after legal source/path/terms are provided

user_action_required.action: Provide one more legal independent t50-capable UCY_students-family long-track source before train/val/holdout source-CV can be attempted.
user_action_required.allowed_next_command: rerun relevant Stage42 conversion/source-CV only after legal source/path/terms are provided

user_action_required.action: Use TrajNet++ challenge data only for scene-format diagnostics, or provide legal raw long-track TrajNet-compatible sources if t100 source-CV is required.
user_action_required.allowed_next_command: rerun relevant Stage42 conversion/source-CV only after legal source/path/terms are provided

user_action_required.action: Confirm official ETH-Person terms or provide permitted ETH_UCY long raw sources, then rerun official conversion and strict source-CV.
user_action_required.allowed_next_command: rerun relevant Stage42 conversion/source-CV only after legal source/path/terms are provided

user_action_required.action: Report metric/time only inside explicitly source-specific calibrated subsets after conversion/eval; keep global M3W raw-frame/dataset-local.
user_action_required.allowed_next_command: rerun relevant Stage42 conversion/source-CV only after legal source/path/terms are provided

next_best_actions: provide one more independent t50-capable UCY_students-family source
verify ETH-Person terms before using XML dry-run as official evidence
provide legal raw long TrajNet-compatible tracks if t100 source-CV is required
